message:
✨ Frontend: IAM auth visibility, Cloud IAM connect, and actionable error messages (#1658)

- Add authMethod field to frontend ClusterInfo type
- Add "Cloud IAM" third auth option in Connect tab with provider-specific
  two-step instructions (authenticate + register cluster) for AWS EKS,
  Google GKE, Azure AKS, and OpenShift
- Add "Cloud Quick Connect" section at top of Command-Line tab that
  detects installed cloud CLIs via /cloud-cli-status and shows
  provider-specific commands with copy buttons
- Add auth method badges (IAM/Token/Cert) on cluster cards in grid,
  list, and compact layouts
- Add actionable error messages for IAM auth failures: provider-specific
  session refresh commands (e.g., "aws sso login") shown when exec-plugin
  auth errors are detected
- Add auth method detection in kubeconfig import preview (shows IAM/Token/Cert
  badge per context before importing)
- Add AuthMethod field to KubeconfigPreviewEntry for import preview
- Add i18n keys for all new Cloud IAM UI strings

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -294,6 +294,7 @@ type KubeconfigPreviewEntry struct {
 	ClusterName string `json:"clusterName"`
 	ServerURL   string `json:"serverUrl"`
 	UserName    string `json:"userName"`
+	AuthMethod  string `json:"authMethod,omitempty"` // exec, token, certificate, auth-provider, unknown
 	IsNew       bool   `json:"isNew"`
 }
 
@@ -314,6 +315,7 @@ func (k *KubectlProxy) PreviewKubeconfig(yamlContent string) ([]KubeconfigPrevie
 			ContextName: name,
 			ClusterName: ctx.Cluster,
 			UserName:    ctx.AuthInfo,
+			AuthMethod:  detectAuthMethod(incoming.AuthInfos[ctx.AuthInfo]),
 		}
 		if cluster, ok := incoming.Clusters[ctx.Cluster]; ok {
 			entry.ServerURL = cluster.Server

@@ -28,6 +28,8 @@ export interface ClusterInfo {
   pvcCount?: number
   pvcBoundCount?: number
   isCurrent?: boolean
+  // Auth method detected from kubeconfig (exec = IAM/cloud CLI, token, certificate, auth-provider)
+  authMethod?: 'exec' | 'token' | 'certificate' | 'auth-provider' | 'unknown'
   // Reachability fields (from health check)
   reachable?: boolean
   lastSeen?: string

@@ -2568,7 +2568,25 @@
     "connectAdding": "Adding...",
     "connectSuccess": "Cluster added successfully",
     "connectNext": "Next",

+    "cloudIAMStepAuth": "Authenticate",

+    "cloudIAMProviderAWS": "AWS EKS",

+    "authErrorIAMHint": "Your cloud session may have expired. Run:",
